name: Pork Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Diced fully cooked ham or raw boneless pork
1/2 cup Thinly sliced green onions (including tops)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or wok, heat 1/2 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
2. Add the eggs and cook without stirring until set. Remove the cooked eggs by inverting the skillet over a baking sheet and cut into strips measuring about 1-1/2 x 1/2 inches.
3. In the same skillet, add the remaining oil over medium-high heat. Stir-fry the ham or raw boneless pork, mushrooms, and green onions for three minutes, or until the mushrooms and onions are tender.
4. Stir in the cooked rice and egg strips. Sprinkle with soy sauce. Toss lightly to combine and heat thoroughly.
Each serving provides:
278 calories
14.1 g protein
10.4 g fat
31.3 g carbohydrate
719 mg sodium
156 mg cholesterol
NOTE: Optional ingredients are omitted from the nutritional calculations. When ingredient options appear in a recipe, the first ingredient choice is used for calculation.
